Package model.ofx

Class Transaction

java.lang.Object
model.ofx.Transaction
Direct Known Subclasses:
InvestmentTransaction
public class Transaction extends Object
Transaction represents a banking transaction for OFX export. This class supports OFX 2.0 formatting with fields such as transaction type, date, amount, FITID, check number, payee name, and memo.

    • getUuid

      public String getUuid()
      Returns a UUID generated from the FITID if available; otherwise, a new random UUID is returned.

    • getTransactionEntries

      public List<Transaction> getTransactionEntries()
      Returns a list containing just this transaction. This method is useful where a list of transactions is expected.
